description: CompositionBlack sweater dress made of 100% acrylic, has full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, an exaggerated mock collar, textured front and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careWash separately using a mild detergentDo not bleachDrip dryWarm ironThis easy-to-wear sweater from jealous 21 adds a bold as brass look to your winter wardrobe. Show off your urban style in this fashionably tailored piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair this versatile knitwear with a tonal top and richly hued denims.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33"
